name: Bloobirds
description: Bloobirds (now Harmonix AI) sales engagement platform. Search and manage companies, leads, and sales pipeline data through the Bobject API.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Bloobirds API key (generate from Bloobirds admin settings)

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search for companies in Bloobirds using filters. Returns matching company bobjects with their field values. Supports pagination and field-based filtering.

query.description: Search query filters. Use field names as keys and filter values. Example: {"COMPANY__NAME": ["Acme Corp"]}.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Starts at 0. Defaults to 0.

pageSize.description: Number of results per page. Defaults to 25. Maximum 1000.

injectReferences.description: Whether to resolve referenced bobject fields inline. Defaults to false.

sort.description: Array of sort objects. Each object has 'field' and 'direction' ('ASC' or 'DESC').

tools.name: search_leads
tools.description: Search for leads in Bloobirds using filters. Returns matching lead bobjects with their field values. Supports pagination and field-based filtering.

query.description: Search query filters. Use field names as keys and filter values. Example: {"LEAD__EMAIL": ["john@example.com"]}.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Starts at 0. Defaults to 0.

pageSize.description: Number of results per page. Defaults to 25. Maximum 1000.

injectReferences.description: Whether to resolve referenced bobject fields inline. Defaults to false.

sort.description: Array of sort objects. Each object has 'field' and 'direction' ('ASC' or 'DESC').

tools.name: create_company
tools.description: Create a new company bobject in Bloobirds. Provide company field values to create the record in your sales pipeline.

COMPANY__COUNTRY.description: Country where the company is located.

COMPANY__CITY.description: City where the company is located.

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Create a new lead bobject in Bloobirds. Provide lead field values including the associated company reference to create the record.

LEAD__LINKEDIN_URL.description: LinkedIn profile URL of the lead.

LEAD__COMPANY.description: Reference ID of the associated company bobject.

tools.name: update_lead
tools.description: Update an existing lead bobject in Bloobirds. Provide the lead's bobject ID and the fields to update.

bobject_id.description: The unique bobject ID of the lead to update.

LEAD__FULL_NAME.description: Updated full name of the lead.

LEAD__EMAIL.description: Updated email address of the lead.

LEAD__PHONE.description: Updated phone number of the lead.

LEAD__JOB_TITLE.description: Updated job title of the lead.
